# BUG-005 Writeup
> Generated by [Quality Playbook](https://github.com/andrewstellman/quality-playbook) v1.4.6 — Andrew Stellman
> Date: 2026-04-20 · Project: virtio-1.4.6

## 1. Summary

REQ-005 requires reset to preserve slow-path dispatch topology, but `drivers/virtio/virtio_pci_modern.c:653-656` always rejoins callback queues to `virtqueues`.

## 2. Why this is a bug

Initial queue setup distinguishes fast-path and slow-path callback lists. Reset re-enable has `info->msix_vector` available, but it ignores that routing information and silently moves slow-path queues onto the wrong interrupt-dispatch list.

## 3. Regression test

- **Requirement:** REQ-005
- **Test:** `quality/test_regression.py::TestCodeReviewRegressions.test_bug_005_reset_reenable_restores_slow_path_membership`
- **Regression patch:** `quality/patches/BUG-005-regression-test.patch`

## 4. FAIL -> PASS evidence

```text
RED: Command: python3 <direct regression assertion runner> test_bug_005_reset_reenable_restores_slow_path_membership
RED: AssertionError: 'vp_is_slow_path_vector(info->msix_vector)' not found in vp_modern_enable_vq_after_reset()
GREEN: Command: python3 <temp source patcher BUG-005> && python3 <direct regression assertion runner> test_bug_005_reset_reenable_restores_slow_path_membership
GREEN: test_bug_005_reset_reenable_restores_slow_path_membership: PASS
```

See `quality/results/BUG-005.red.log` and `quality/results/BUG-005.green.log`.

## 5. Challenge gate

`quality/challenge/BUG-005-challenge.md` -> **CONFIRMED**

## 6. The fix

- **Fix patch:** `quality/patches/BUG-005-fix.patch`

```diff
diff --git a/drivers/virtio/virtio_pci_modern.c b/drivers/virtio/virtio_pci_modern.c
index 5555555..6666666 100644
--- a/drivers/virtio/virtio_pci_modern.c
+++ b/drivers/virtio/virtio_pci_modern.c
@@ -651,8 +651,12 @@ static int vp_modern_enable_vq_after_reset(struct virtqueue *vq)
 
 	if (vq->callback) {
 		spin_lock_irqsave(&vp_dev->lock, flags);
-		list_add(&info->node, &vp_dev->virtqueues);
+		if (vp_is_slow_path_vector(info->msix_vector))
+			list_add(&info->node, &vp_dev->slow_virtqueues);
+		else
+			list_add(&info->node, &vp_dev->virtqueues);
 		spin_unlock_irqrestore(&vp_dev->lock, flags);
 	} else {
 		INIT_LIST_HEAD(&info->node);
```
